title: Flowchart Diagram Example
subtitle: Show an annotated flowchart with explanatory notes.

sections.heading: Flowchart Diagram in use
sections.body: This flowchart shows the expected diagram payload: named nodes, explicit edges, explanatory notes, and a decision table around the graphic.

cards.title: Source
cards.body: Collect notes, code references, and constraints before layout begins.

cards.title: Distill
cards.body: Reduce the material to nodes, edges, labels, and review questions.

cards.title: Validate
cards.body: Check that the graphic remains readable in light mode and print.

sections.heading: Artifact production flow
sections.body: The same structured data can render as an inline SVG diagram in the single-file artifact.

rows: What source material is trustworthy enough to render?
Which section types represent the material without custom code?
Does the output stay offline and accessible?
Can a reader act without opening the repository?
